name: Network Operations
description: WAN/LAN, VPN, firewall, DNS, load balancers, site connectivity

name: Enterprise Applications
description: ERP, CRM, HR systems, internal business applications and their integrations

name: End User Computing
description: Laptops, desktops, printers, mobile devices, OS issues, standard software installs

name: Database Administration
description: Oracle/SQL Server/PostgreSQL availability, performance, backups, access requests

name: Identity & Access Management
description: AD/Entra ID accounts, SSO, MFA, password resets, access provisioning

name: Cloud Platform
description: Azure/AWS infrastructure, Kubernetes, CI/CD platform, cloud cost and quota issues

name: Security Operations
description: Phishing, malware, suspicious activity, data leakage, security incidents

name: L1 Service Desk
description: Fallback queue for unclassified or low-confidence incidents requiring human triage
